Require a Nokia Reply to Screen Lock Pin facility for Nokia 6 please!
Can I have a response from Nokia to my query please?
What is an "accessibility service"?
I would greatly appreciate a reply from Nokia. Thank you for listening.
Sorry to hear you've not had a response to your query yet. As this is a peer-to-peer community we can't always guarantee that you will get an answer right away. That's why we always recommend you contact our customer support directly when you need urgent technical support. Just scroll down to Find answers, then select Chat with us and access our 24h live English language customer support.
But to answer your question - it is possible to lock your Nokia 6 screen. Here are the instructions on how to do it.
Accessibility services relate to certain settings that can make the use of your phone easier. You can find some more info here. For further info and for help turning them off I recommend contacting our customer service.

original text:
Home " Tactical Research Boots " Are you Considering Minimalist Military Boots?
Are you Considering Minimalist Military Boots?
If you are shopping for military boots, you have likely heard about minimalist footwear, and if you aren't sure what this term means, don't worry, we are going to go over it in detail. Currently on the footwear market, there are many different types of minimalist boots available. To help you decide whether or not you want to try this footwear, we have provided you with four benefits that these boots provide over traditional combat boots.
One of the main reasons you may want to consider minimalist military boots is because this type of footwear helps to increase agility and speed thanks to a very light boot weight, which won't drain your energy while wearing.
When you have these light boots on your feet, you will spend less energy running and walking, which means you will be able to go farther for longer periods of time. This is especially beneficial when you are working overtime or taking part in long missions or marches.
Unlike some types of combat boots or tactical boots, minimalist boots promote a very natural gait. A natural gait is created by a 5mm or less drop. This unique drop allows you to enjoy full extension of your muscles including your gluteus maximus, hamstrings and calves.
As the name would suggest, minimalist military boots are made with less material and padding than traditional work boots. For this reason, when you wear this type of boot on your feet, you will enjoy a stronger back, feet, and ankles.
One of the most popular minimalist military boots on the market right now is the Mini-Mil series from Tactical Research. These well-made combat boots will provide you with the four benefits listed above and are available at incredibly affordable prices. To make sure we can meet the needs of military members in any branch, first responders, and those who need every day footwear, we have stocked our inventory full of different colors, styles, and heights. If you have any questions about minimalist boots, please feel free to contact us and our customer service representatives will be glad to help you.

original text: Set along the banks of the Garonne River, Hôtel Pier is just 150 metres from Palais de Justice Metro Station and next to a tram stop servicing Toulouse Blagnac Airport. It offers a terrace, free WiFi access and rooms with free bottles of mineral water. The rooms at Hôtel Pier are decorated in a contemporary style and also have a minibar. While all of them have a flat-screen TV, some of them also have views of the river, a Nespresso coffee machine or a balcony. A buffet breakfast is served every morning at the hotel and local restaurants can be found just 500 metres away. Other onsite facilities include luggage storage and private parking, available with an extra cost. This property is just opposite the Garonne River and a 15-minute walk from Place Esquirol. Toulouse Exhibition Centre is 750 metres away and Toulouse Stadium is 1.5 km from the hotel.
processed_text:

It offers a terrace, free WiFi access and rooms with free bottles of mineral water.
The rooms at Hôtel Pier are decorated in a contemporary style and also have a minibar.
While all of them have a flat-screen TV, some of them also have views of the river, a Nespresso coffee machine or a balcony.
A buffet breakfast is served every morning at the hotel and local restaurants can be found just 500 metres away.
Other onsite facilities include luggage storage and private parking, available with an extra cost.
This property is just opposite the Garonne River and a 15-minute walk from Place Esquirol.
Toulouse Exhibition Centre is 750 metres away and Toulouse Stadium is 1.5 km from the hotel.

original text:
On how many pcs/laptops can i install acb? I guess i can use the same account on all of em. Will my save file be the same, so i can play on my laptop on the road and continue where i left off when i get home?
You should be able to install it as often as you like, it's not bound to a pc, it's bound to your account.
And since it saves both offline and online, you should be able to just copy/paste your offline save-file whenever you switch computers. Do a search on where this save-file is found, probably somewhere in your user-folder, shouldn't be too hard to locate.
As for when it saves online, you won't have to do that, I think the game automatically loads the latest save file.
So, if you always have internet access, you won't have problems with the save-file.
If you some times switch between offline and online gaming, you should make sure to always copy your offline save-file between both computers.
If you some times switch between offline and online gaming, you should make sure to always copy your offline save-file between both computers. Brotherhood does NOT save online.
Sorry for the false information then.

original text:
James Howell Jr. lost big two years ago when Hurricane Matthew swelled the Tar River, less than a half mile from his home. Finally persuaded it was too dangerous to stay, he returned two days later to discover that two feet of standing water had turned his insulation moldy, forcing a rebuild of his living room.
Now a sofa and other furniture rest under tarps on his small front porch as he and his wife Gloria prepare for Hurricane Florence, which is shaping up to be much bigger and wetter, dumping rain that could be measured in feet.
"It's scaring me to death," Howell said. "If I lose my place, I ain't coming back. I'm not coming back to Princeville no more."
Howell figures he has two options if he needs to flee. His daughter lives about 30 miles west, away from the river. That's where he said he'd be taking his most prized possessions, already loaded aboard his pickup. His granddaughter, meanwhile, is staying in a secure motel thanks to her retail employer, so he and his wife may be able to rest there.
The rich have long claimed higher ground along waterways. That left freed slaves to build their homes on bottomland. That's where Princeville became the country's first town incorporated by black Americans. The land about 75 miles (121 kilometers) east of Raleigh has been repeatedly inundated by the Tar River -- at least eight times before Matthew. In 1999, Hurricane Floyd's rains overwhelmed a dike and submerged the town in water 23 feet (7 meters) deep in spots.
Many people with limited means, like the disabled Howells, will struggle to escape and rebuild after Florence's damage is done.
The median household income of Princeville's 2,300 residents is about $28,000 a year compared to the statewide $48,000, and almost six of ten town residents had public health insurance such as Medicare, Medicaid or the Children's Health Insurance Program in 2016, according to the US Census Bureau.
Forecasters are warning anyone living near waterways in the Carolinas to seek higher ground, and that means trouble for some of the poorest communities in eastern North Carolina and South Carolina where black people have faced historic inequality.
"What I'm fearful about is there are a lot of people who are not going to be OK because they don't have elevated structures," said Susan Cutter, director of the Hazards and Vulnerability Research Institute at the University of South Carolina. "They're in low-lying flood prone areas and they didn't leave because they had nowhere to go and no resources to get there."
People still haven't recovered fully from Matthew in small, economically struggling communities across eastern North Carolina, from Seven Springs and Windsor near Virginia's border to Lumberton along the South Carolina line.
Gov. Roy Cooper, elected weeks after that hurricane hit, promised Tuesday that low-income people won't be left to fend for themselves during this storm. The state is using detailed mapping to pinpoint potential flooding from Florence, and sharing that information to help local authorities warn people to move.
"The idea is to have those shelters available to people on higher ground, and no matter what their income, we want to get people out of places that may be flooding," Cooper said.
In Beaufort County, more than 100 miles (161 kilometers) east of Raleigh, emergency management officials will use school buses Wednesday to move residents living in flood-prone areas to higher ground in Washington, the county seat, where a high school will shelter up to 500 people. The county is split by the broad Pamlico River and some of the 45,000 residents lack vehicles to reach the shelter on their own.
"We are trying to provide transportation where they do not have transportation," said Carnie Hedgepeth, the county's emergency services director.
Retired sisters Clydie Gardner, 71, and Dorothy Pope, 78, ran in 2016 as floodwaters spread toward their home, just before a massive oak tree, its roots loosened by Matthew's rain, toppled onto the building. They're seeking shelter this time in an aunt's home on higher ground across the river.
"They're saying it's 400 miles wide. There's no telling what it might do," Pope said. "When the water starts coming and I see it coming, I'm moving."

There are some aspects to take into considerations just before deciding upon the solution that suits your household and your condition.
1. How many people live in your house?
2. Do you own any pets? Do you have multiple pets?
3. Have you got young children?
4. Is anyone in your home a cigarette smoker?
The IICRC, the Institute of Inspection, Cleaning and Restoration Certification is actually an independent agency that trains and screens carpet cleaning technicians all through the US. In accordance with the IICRC, everyone should have their carpets cleaned one or more times every year.
Families with pets and cigarette smokers must clean up their carpets twice yearly. Big family members or households having numerous pets must really clean up their carpets every quarter, or four times every year.
1. Dirt, dustmites, germs and also other allergens get caught deep on the fibers of your carpet and are also overlooked by most vacuum and carpet cleaners. All these contaminants seriously decrease the air quality in your home and can result in difficulty in breathing for the members of your family.
2. Clean carpets significantly boost the visual appeal of your house.
3. Clean carpets offer a healthy environment for your small children as well as pets, who spend a lot of time playing and relaxing on the floor.
To get a deeply, longer lasting, professional carpet cleaning service, Majestic Carpet Cleaning in Blackwood, New Jersey is the company suitable for you. With state-of-the-art, truck mounted cleaning machines, we clean up the carpets & upholstery and remove 85-90% of the pet dander, dustmites and other allergens caught up in the carpets. The process is 100% green carpet cleaning; all cleaning agents employed are non-toxic and bio-degradable.
Call Majestic Carpet Cleaning in Blackwood, New Jersey right now at 856-228-5225. You'll be happy you did.

original text:
Drugs are among the biggest menace threatening the young population. Drugs are also the cause of crime and violence propagated by the users and the dealers involved in their supply. As soon as your children start coming to mature age, start talking to them about drugs. Here are some ways you can easily talk to your kids about drugs.
The first thing you ought to do is explain the difference between legal and illegal drugs to your kids. For young children, this is the most fundamental knowledge you can give them as a parent as they will know the good drugs used as medicine to heal sicknesses and diseases and the illegal drugs which have negative impacts on one's health. Ensure that you explain to them which drugs are good and the importance of keeping to drugs issued by doctors an taking the right dose as per the doctor's prescription. Read more now!
The second thing you ought to do is ensure that you give clear information to your children. As a parent, it is advisable that you give your children clear information on questions they ask you about drugs as they seek to quench their curiosity. Keep in mind their age and ability to process information when having a conversation. Cannabis is quite challenging a topic when kids bring it up as it has been legalized in some states. When your kids ask you about it ensure that you make it clear that it is only legalized for medical users and individuals with prescriptions and also what they ought to do when someone offers it to them. Give them clear information on the effects the drugs but don't scare them with threats.
The influence of peers at school exposes your children to drugs more than any other place during their lifetime. One of the ways you can get your children to talk about drugs to you is by creating a platform at home where that can freely open up about drugs. Create a friendship with your children and by doing this they will always come to you for advice on issues pertaining to their experiences on drugs. When your child realizes that they can trust you, they won't be secretive and will always consult you before making a decision. You can also create chances where you show films on the impact of drugs on your children so that they can get a picture of why you always warn them on the drugs. Lastly, make the best decisions for your family and ensure that you as the parents live a life which your kids can emulate. Visit this homepage for more info.

Create a friendship with your children and by doing this they will always come to you for advice on issues pertaining to their experiences on drugs.
When your child realizes that they can trust you, they won't be secretive and will always consult you before making a decision.
You can also create chances where you show films on the impact of drugs on your children so that they can get a picture of why you always warn them on the drugs.
Lastly, make the best decisions for your family and ensure that you as the parents live a life which your kids can emulate.
